allow: PowerShell(function Test-Port\($port\) { $c = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $task = $c.ConnectAsync\('localhost', $port\); if \($task.Wait\(2000\)\) { "Port ${port}: OPEN" } else { "Port ${port}: TIMEOUT" } } catch { "Port ${port}: CLOSED \($\($_.Exception.Message\)\)" } finally { $c.Close\(\) } }; Test-Port 1433; Test-Port 62656)
